title: dump tran
text: dump tran Generate dump transaction statements in the SQL scripts created by the Create Table facility. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = dump tran { DatabaseName } Arguments DatabaseName —name of the database which should have its transaction log truncated. Description When this option is enabled, the SQL script generated by the Create table facility adds one dump transaction command for each table it creates: dump transaction DatabaseName with truncate_only Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
